label: Vitally
description: Connect Anton to Vitally to read account health, trigger playbooks, and sync customer success data.

form.title: Connect Vitally
form.subtitle: Paste your Vitally API key and subdomain to give Anton access to your customer success workspace.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Vitally API secret key and workspace subdomain. Takes about 60 seconds — no OAuth flow required.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Vitally API Key

1. Log in to your Vitally workspace at `https://<yoursubdomain>.vitally.io`.
2. Click your avatar or workspace name in the bottom-left corner, then go to **Settings**.
3. In the left sidebar, navigate to **Integrations → API**.
4. Click **Create API Key**, give it a descriptive name like `Anton`, then click **Save**.
5. Copy the generated secret key — it is shown only once. If you lose it, you must revoke and create a new one.
6. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.
7. Enter your Vitally **subdomain** (the part before `.vitally.io` in your workspace URL).

## Notes

- API keys inherit the permissions of the workspace they belong to; use a dedicated key for Anton so it can be revoked independently.
- If you do not see the **API** section under Integrations, confirm you have Admin rights in Vitally.
- The base API URL Anton will use is `https://rest.vitally.io`.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your Vitally API secret key. Found under Settings → Integrations → API.

fields.name: subdomain
fields.label: Workspace Subdomain
fields.description: The subdomain of your Vitally workspace (e.g. 'yourcompany' from yourcompany.vitally.io).
